entries.notes: Legacy /fugu is registered as a deprecated alias. Prototype lane defaults to dry-run safety/plan/check/report with read-only pre-report agents and stops before Worker edits or PR delivery.

Research a question across the web with cross-checked sources. Read-only + web-only: every agent runs against read-only repo tools plus web_search/web_fetch and no agent receives write. Verify returns bounded supported claims (max 3 claims, each claim max 140 chars, max 2 source URLs each max 200 chars) through its structured result; worst-case four-byte Unicode payloads remain below 10KB. Report returns one bounded candidate summary, but the host acknowledgement derives its summary from retained cited evidence. The host flattens/escapes claims, deterministically renders cited Markdown into a fresh private tmpdir directory via an injectable writer, and returns the absolute path; no cwd/.pi/.research writes and no model-controlled path. Registered as a builtin command alongside issue-delivery, adversarial-review, and code-review.
Investigate a task, then cross-check each finding with skeptical reviewers. Registered as a builtin command. Supports --evidence and --reviewers/--threshold knobs.
Multi-angle code review with independent verification and synthesis. Registered as a builtin command. Review agents receive only read-only tools.
Summarize workflow cache, cost, context, trace, and compaction telemetry. Registered separately from builtin-commands.ts.

Saved implementation engine promoted from issue-delivery-lc (which remains installed as a local variant). Invoked inline by closed_loop_issue_delivery via workflow('issue_delivery'). Low-cost model routing by default.

Canonical saved workflow is installed. Implementation delegates to the saved issue_delivery engine; no dependence on the deprecated /fugu alias. prototype=true is reserved for explicit harness smoke runs. Normal use remains issue/plan driven.
Canonical saved workflow is installed. Repair should usually run only after an official review finding exists.
Exposes detailed review-depth knobs plus prototype=true mapping for ad-hoc smoke reviews. Explicit knobs override prototype defaults.
Prefer analyzer spelling for canonical name; keep analyser alias because it is already installed.
Source-backed adversarial validation saved workflow. Recorded for operator visibility; external saved workflow contents are local installation state.
Frontend-specific review saved workflow. Recorded for operator visibility; external saved workflow contents are local installation state.

Universal design-system compliance delivery engine. Generic template ships in docs/workflows/templates/foundation_ui_compliance.workflow.mjs; setup + Foundation Gate Contract in docs/workflows/foundation-ui-compliance.md. All gates run through the single entrypoint in the app's vendored foundation (<foundation>/scripts/run-foundation-gates.mjs — the foundation owns the gate list, so foundation changes propagate with zero workflow edits). App/org specifics arrive via args/per-repo harness JSON, never in the engine; orgs keep a pinned, CI-gated template of record in their own foundation repo and reinstall after updates. Hard rules: frontier judge, editScope-confined fixers (third_party/** always deny; editScope is prompt guidance only — the runtime has no path-glob tool policy, and the re-gate validates resulting UI compliance but does not enforce or attest which paths were edited), gates every round, run receipt (no transcript-backed trace-assert — the runtime exposes no trace API).
